title: Accounts
convertedNote: Converted to {{base}} at the latest exchange rate. Accounts stay in their own currency.
includeNw: Include this account in net worth
allowNegOn: Spending can take this account below zero.
allowNegOff: Transactions that would overdraw this account are blocked.
dueNextCycle: 0 due this cycle — you created this card after the statement day, so {{amount}} is due next, on {{date}}.
dematNote: This is the total you've put into your demat account. Allocate it across stocks & mutual funds in the Investments section.
deleteBody: You can delete this account and all its transactions, or keep the transactions (they will remain in your history but the account will be hidden).
directNote: Adds a silent adjustment so the balance matches — not shown as income/expense.
txnNote: Adds an income or expense for the difference, so it appears in history & insights.
